title: Our brand-new cohort of AWS Heroes has arrived – June 2024
description: The vibrant AWS community is made up of millions of builders worldwide. Within this global audience, there are technical enthusiasts who are going above and beyond to solve problems and generously share their learnings and best practices to empower others—the AWS Heroes. These inspirational leaders make significant contributions, and the AWS Heroes program is our […]
creator: Taylor Jacobsen
